faqs.question: What pests are most common in Dyker Heights homes?
faqs.answer: Dyker Heights residents most frequently deal with German cockroaches, pavement ants, house mice, brown rats, and common house spiders. Seasonal pests like cluster flies and stink bugs can also be problematic, particularly in fall. Our general pest control service addresses all these common invaders with targeted treatments.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule pest control service in Dyker Heights?
faqs.answer: We recommend quarterly pest control treatments (every 3 months) for most Dyker Heights homes to maintain year-round protection. However, properties near Dyker Beach Park or with previous infestations may benefit from monthly or bi-monthly services. Our technicians will assess your specific situation and recommend the optimal schedule.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We prioritize the safety of your family and pets by using EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques. Our technicians are trained in safe application methods, and we offer eco-friendly and low-toxicity options for sensitive households. Treated areas are typically safe for re-entry within 2-4 hours.

faqs.question: What does the $175-$300 general pest control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough interior and exterior inspection, identification of pest entry points, targeted treatment of affected areas, preventive perimeter applications, and a detailed report with recommendations. Pricing varies based on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.
